headline: RBC Capital and Freedom Broker Raise Price Targets on Deere (DE) After Strong Quarterly Earnings
summary: Deere & Company (NYSE:DE) ranks among the best set-it-and-forget-it stocks to buy right now. On May 26, RBC Capital increased its price target for Deere & Company (NYSE:DE) to $752 from $736, retaining an Outperform rating on the company’s shares. The firm referenced Deere’s second-quarter earnings, which outperformed forecasts despite the absence of an IEEPA […]

headline: How CAT Stock Doubles Again To Reach $2,000
summary: Caterpillar (NYSE: CAT) has undergone a historic structural re-rating over the past year. Closing at $1,057 on June 25, 2026, the stock has surged roughly 172% from its level of $388 just a year ago.

headline: 1 Oversold Stock Ready to Bounce Back and 2 We Avoid
summary: Hitting a new 52-week low can be a pivotal moment for any stock. These floors often mark either the beginning of a turnaround story or confirmation that a company faces serious headwinds.

headline: Deere (DE) Is Up 7.0% After Raising Guidance, Expanding Buybacks And Highlighting AI Efficiency Investments
summary: Earlier this month, Deere & Company filed an omnibus shelf registration covering a wide range of securities while also raising its full-year net income guidance and authorizing a new share repurchase program, alongside highlighting ongoing investments in AI-enabled operational efficiency. This combination of enhanced financial outlook, added balance sheet flexibility, and emphasis on AI-driven cost management is reshaping how investors assess Deere’s long-term profit potential and capital...
